privileged_info_summary: The FOMC Policy Archival task targets the January 27-28, 2026 FOMC meeting, which is the most recent past meeting as of March 8, 2026. The Statement PDF is genuinely available for download from https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/files/monetary20260128a1.pdf. However, the Implementation Note is not available as a downloadable PDF—the Federal Reserve only provides it as an HTML page at https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260128a1.htm. All five content keywords (inflation, Committee, target range, employment, federal funds rate) appear in the actual January 28, 2026 FOMC statement. The domain keywords are accurate: federalreserve.gov is the official Federal Reserve website, and monetary policy content is hosted at /monetarypolicy paths. The data source is the real Federal Reserve website, not synthetic data.
